title: Signal Correlation De-Duplication Guard
summary: A 2025 paper on reinforcement-learning signal combination (Tandfonline) identified that reconciling correlated signals — particularly multiple moving averages — is a core challenge in technical analysis systems, and applied PCA to reduce dimensionality and information redundancy before feeding signals to a policy network. Decifer's 9 dimensions include several that are likely highly correlated (e.g. trend + momentum + breakout all capture directional price movement). Without decorrelation, the composite score double-counts the same information, inflating conviction on crowded signals. This feature computes a pairwise correlation matrix for the 9 dimensions and downweights correlated clusters.
deferral_reason: Future; partially addressed by intra-portfolio-rolling-corr — deferred during paper_trading_single_account prioritisation
